creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
The alternative method described in the vt manpage which I tried as potential workaround also does not show any visible effect:

/boot/loader.conf:
kern.vt.color.0.rgb="00,10,00"
kern.vt.color.15.rgb="10,0,0"

Just to mention, this whole behavior is independent of whether vesa.ko is loaded or not.
hw.vga.textmode="YES" also does not change anything.
OS used for testing is 13.0-RELEASE-p6 on amd64.
